creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Hello, I write as future maintainer of the port (I made the request for adoption in bug #232118).

I think this bug can safely be closed: it was reported in may 2016, the issue could not be reproduced, the reporter has not answered since february 2017 and the version involved was 5.39.0 while 5.41.0 is in ports tree and my adoption request updates to 5.42.1.
